notes: The public bundle resolves all four skills from the upstream XiaoMi/hiui repository with explicit git ref/path entries.
The repo clone used to bootstrap installation may move with master, but the installed skill content remains pinned by workflow-bundle.lock.json.
Workflow 1.1.0 expects the downstream hiui-design planner contract to expose requiredDocs[].readMode, requiredActions, formalAcceptanceActions, currentExecutionState, and canStartImplementation.
The hiui-design manifest is still 1.0.0 in this branch, so compatibility must be judged by planner contract availability, not by semver label alone.
The next workflow candidate is validated locally through workflow-bundle.local.lock.json before the public git-pinned lock is refreshed to an upstream commit.
